free_text: Measurement of the total cross sections of ultracold
neutrons with noble gases and search for long-range
UCN facility PF2 of the ILL reactor.
The apparatus consists of UCN spectrometer with valves
for filling and emptying a neutron guide system, UCN
Spectrometer is a vertical cylinder with diameter 60cm,
height 200 cm, made from copper with the inner surface
The test beam of the UCN facility PF2.
Measuring UCN storage time at different gas pressure.
Method was proposed in the articles:
Pt-gas,mbar*s  - parameter determining UCN losses due
to interaction with gas atoms. obtained as a result of
linear extrapolation by the least squares method of the
data of probability of UCN losses versus gas pressure.
Admixtures in He gas - 0.013 (units are not given).
This work was supported by the Russian Foundation for
10-02-00224a) and by the Ministry of Education and

method (or UCN storage method) and neutron
interferometer measurements cannot be explained by the
n-e scattering, the presented discrepancy is likely to
be due to a systematic experimental error.
